description: A search marketing strategist needs to optimize a client's WordPress blog for search engines. Activate the installed Yoast SEO plugin and configure the site-wide Title Separator to a dash (-) and the Homepage Meta description to: 'Explore expert articles on WordPress development, blogging tips, and essential plugins for building better websites.' Optimize the blog post 'Getting Started with WordPress' by setting the focus keyphrase to 'getting started with wordpress' and the meta description to: 'Learn why WordPress powers over 40% of the web. This beginner guide covers the key advantages of WordPress and how to start building your first site.' Optimize the blog post '10 Essential WordPress Plugins Every Site Needs' by setting the focus keyphrase to 'essential wordpress plugins' and the meta description to: 'Discover the top 10 must-have WordPress plugins for 2024 including Yoast SEO, WP Super Cache, Wordfence, and WooCommerce to supercharge your website.'

metadata.p2_title: 10 Essential WordPress Plugins Every Site Needs
